name: Multiple injuries from one accident in Taylorsville, all covered?

mainEntity.name: Multiple injuries from one accident in Taylorsville, all covered?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**Yes, workers' comp covers all arising from the incident.**[3]

Medical for each; combined impairment rating.

- Document separately.
- No limit on body parts.
- Wage loss holistic.

Full eval ensures nothing missed.
